task_tokens_consumed: Is a Helmholtz gradient-field decomposition LLM update mechanism anticipated by 2024-2026 prior art?

hypothesized_clusters.cluster_description: LoRA variants that project updates onto null-space or orthogonal subspaces of pretrained weights.
Methods that decompose or project gradients onto orthogonal directions to reduce interference.
GEM/OGD/SubTrack for catastrophic-forgetting mitigation via orthogonal updates.
Hodge decomposition, exterior calculus applied to neural network gradients.
OrthAlign-style methods aligning multiple objectives via orthogonal subspace decomposition.

landscape_completeness_claim: Five clusters cover null-space, orthogonal projection, continual learning, Hodge differential-geometric, multi-objective. Helmholtz specifically falls under C2 + C4.
